18#ifndef MEDIA_C_BUFFER_H_
19#define MEDIA_C_BUFFER_H_
20
21#include <stddef.h>
22#include <stdint.h>

24#include "memories.h"
25#include "properties.h"
26
27#ifdef __cplusplus
28extern "C" {
29#endif
30
61typedef struct {
62 memories_t* memories;
63 uint64_t timestamp;
64 uint32_t nb;
65 properties_t* metadata;
66} buffer_t;
67
77static inline buffer_t* buffer_new(memories_t* memories, uint64_t timestamp, uint32_t nb, properties_t* metadata) {
78 buffer_t* buffer = (buffer_t*)malloc(sizeof(buffer_t));
79 if (buffer != NULL) {
80 buffer->memories = memories;
81 buffer->timestamp = timestamp;
82 buffer->nb = nb;
83 buffer->metadata = metadata;
84 }
85 return buffer;
86}
87
96static inline void buffer_free(buffer_t* buffer) {
97 if (buffer != NULL) {
98 free(buffer);
99 }
100}
101
113static inline uint8_t* buffer_get_data(const buffer_t* buffer, size_t index) {
114 uint8_t* result = NULL;
115 if ((buffer != NULL) && (buffer->memories != NULL)) {
116 memory_t* mem = memories_get(buffer->memories, index);
117 if (mem != NULL) {
118 result = &mem->data[mem->offset];
119 }
120 }
121 return result;
122}
123
124#ifdef __cplusplus
125}
126#endif
127
128#endif // MEDIA_C_BUFFER_H_
